scripts.build: npm --workspace @wa-chat/config run build && npm --workspace @wa-chat/shared run build && tsc
scripts.test: npm --workspace @wa-chat/config run build && npm --workspace @wa-chat/shared run build && node --import tsx src/index.test.ts && node --import tsx src/dlq/replay.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @wa-chat/config run build && npm --workspace @wa-chat/shared run build && tsc --noEmit
